TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Austria, title = Austria, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Austria} }

S.FORM: Austria hya' ga cyux maki' tay 47 20 N, 13 20 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 83,871 sq km (maki' tay 114 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 82,445 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,426 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 8,711,770. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 38.40%, lhlahuy hya' ga 47.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 14.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Vienna. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 26 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Alexander Van der Bellen, aring ryax tay 26 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. kkian Awtiri ga maki beh Oco na ska. rhyal siga wagiq tong ga rroq. A'pessan hnasun nya Awtiri. nanu yasa tehok qmisan lga san nha mslokah hi. rhyal rgyax maki 7% labang nya, syang na rgyax bhoboh tunux kwara. ska nya ga cecingyentayz . wagiq na rgyax ga takloknasan , hayapa ga 3798 米. weyna ga penti. tongnan ru pepu ga cyuring ru wagiq na rgyax. Dongpepu ga Donaw llyung, qruyux nya ga 350 koli. hanbu crux mu'h ru tlawah situ ga crux inh ru sa'cah . Awitiri ga maki hrhul na hakyang ru hoyaq cikay kayal nya, qmisan lga rhyaq. 'bagan lga mkilux. Awtiri na hlahuy ga fukayri ga 46.7 pasento, qalang mani ga spiyang tama beh syang na Donawh na weyna . spiyang na hogal ga crux sa'spaw . inspuluk , klac rulic . hitocbo nya ga 838379 pinxwang meta. ggalan pila Awitiri qani ga hoyaw balay ggalan pila. blaq balay qyanux squilq nha. yal qmayeh ru koba ga hoyaw kwara. spang nya balay ga kmalay kin, kikay, abura, lengki, kobana wazyang kbalay qhunq ru qsya;zyuwaw na pnqnyatan ga cyux kaping bzyoq. qmayeh ga cuyx ramat, mubi, qetun, ngahi. ggalan pila ga ubuy Omong na koka. nanu tasa maras cingay balay pila ma. 2006 kawas Awtiri na GDP tongan 3.3%. khmay na squilq kwara Awtiri qalang qani ga maki 92% na squilq, siki tehoq 1990 kawas nanslafu na yaqeh squilq mwah tmwan Awtiri, hga ga bolopa na squilq. kruma 10% ga iyat Awtiri na squilq, kwara squilq aring syaw na squilq. tokubet To'o na koka, maki qutux mang spat seng na Sloweniya . maki kntungpang ru Stiriya qalang. Oco ga cyugal qu rinhoyal. (Z'mat 日耳曼, Slafu 斯拉夫, lating 拉丁) Awtiri qalang qani ga lhuyal Z'mang Almanni , PaFariya , Flangk msqun. Maca', syownu, Slafu ru Loma na 'tayal uzi. ke'ru gaga nha ga mtnaq cikay uzi, kya nanak gaga nha uzi. hminas 74% na Awtiri squilq ga snhi cyorokay kwara 59.9% lga snhi Loma tengsukyo, 6% ga c'ng cyaw hey 3.5% ga 新教路德宗, 4% lga binah na 新教, 6% ga islancyang , Focyang , intucyaw , cingay balay itay na squilq maki Awtiri, 1930 kawas yutay hminas mcilyaq mopuw mang squilq nya, suruw lga trang te sazing cinbwanan hrgi' xalan pyutan . 1900 kawas thay kya halay 6,003,845 squilq nya la. suruw lga hbuyaw squilq la. 2017 kawas 3 byacing 14 ryax Awtiri na maki 8.598. 375 kwara squilq la. ke' Awtiri na mrhuw ga 德語 skatal nha, syaalmani skatal nha, congpaFaliya skayal nha uzi. ke' na Awtiri ckaw 德語 skayal nha uzi. ke' na Awtiri ckaw 德語 skayal nha. zywaw kinbkisan 1683 kawas Hapuspawwang 朝 maki weyena mciraq lga inipagan Oco Congsa glabang na 'tumang 帝國. 'lwan bkisan, Awitiri maki sarçal giray maki squilq piyano pslyan. glen na Loma, cingay balay kay't na squilq hlahuy qalang qani. suruw lga wal qolan Kay; t la. Lomatiko ini agal lga Awtiri leng tehoq Syuw, lungpati , Tongkt , Pafaliya ru Falank wal hga golan. Slafa mholuy musa beh A'pesti . qolan na Awtiri, ms'uruw kalantaniya 王國. kongye 788 kawas caliman wal qolan, sklokah muya pinbahuw, mwah khmay cyorokay uzi. Cariman ru Balank talax la, Awtiri g muck Nanak maki Falank, maki galan qasa ga song nha "marchia Orientalis"東方邊疆領之意. mrhuw na Pafali mlahang qalang qani. 976 kawas maki beh Papnpaw na Liawpot ru mcilyaq Nanslafa ru Syuwyali mlahang rhyal qsu balay maki lalu nya Awtiri mani ga sbibu Nha beh 9964 kawas, trang mbibu Ostarrichi ke' na 古德語 ma. 1156 kawas cipoq balay kneri nya Awtiri magan, 1192 kawas Pappaw na mrhuw wal galun Stayliya. 1246 kawas Awtiri ga mciyaq Fetle maki laytah wal mhoqeng la. Kpyut mciyaq (Papnpaw) la. Awtiri musa Posimiya na Mis' Awtoka na qbao lru 1278 kawas maki Pencyang mciyaq Congtoka ini agal Tic na Rukawfuis ru siki tehok te qutux cinbwanan mciyaq mosoq lga Awtiri lga galan nya Puspaw nasal qani kanhang, Hapuspaw cinngasal ga maki 14.15 seki mlahang slabang rhyal nha. 1526 kawas Awtiri wal nya galuw Posimiya ru 'mantu ini na Syuyari, sazing koka qani ga cingay balay moray nha. 1683 kawas qeru byacing mopuw sazing ryax na Weyena mciyaq cow Awtiri msqun Polan na hetay qryangan nya Weyena sazing byacing lga 'tuman ini maquh hetay qani. aring mciyaq qani ga hits nya 'tuman ru kura beh Oco 中西部 tonga slabang mshzi' bali msqun Hapuspaw wan caw maki Cowo na kenli, suluw lga mluw kwara hetay la. wayal 1699 kawas Ka'lofuci na keyak. Awtiri qalan nya Snsnlomatiko qalang nya. aring 1806 kawas lga Snsnlomatiko hoqeng lga Hopuspaw cinngasal ga mngaza S'lomatiko mouw Pulus, Awtiri taling mluw Pulis bsyaq balay kaw nya squn mna Tici kngli mcicyaq trang Awtiri tema mluw tnaqan Topulus ru 'los pin sazing sanka ru kwabu kengli ru mcilyaq, msqun kwara Awtiri ru Pulus 'los te sazing saka Kwah'polon tequtux ru tecyugal. 1806 kawas S'lomatiko sgayal, aniyasa lga sazing kawas myan, Fulacs Ps's'lomatiko shuti hwanti kmayal nanak muci hya ga Awtiriri na mrhuw ma. knahal ga i Awtiri spiyang qska qalang ga Hpuspow. 1867 kawas thzyazi Awtiri maki Puaw mcilyaq, leqaw nya kablar zyaw qani. pkayal muck Awtiri ga Kongcupang Awsyutiko mrhuw na Awsyugtiko maki Nanak ihwe ru haykuang nha, masoq mcilyaq lga ini maqux Awsyutiko qsugun nya cipoq balay na koka', Laytaniya lga mluw Awtiri la. (aring 1918 kawas mopuw byacing pusalqutux ryax tehoq 1919 kawas qeru byacing pusalqutux ryax) Mpusalqutux byacing song nha TicAwtiri , shtuy nha Tko ru Wemakonghko msqun. 1938 kawas nacuetko ru Taw msqun la. mosoq mcilyaq lga, Awtiri ga knahang pitu kawas na gikang. 1945 kawas ini maqux Nacuetka qani, Awtiri myup knahang Mongclung , siki tehoq 1955 kawas Awtiri koka smunan . maki Awtiri kmayal muci si bsyaq sa kaki kya ma. sqolan Awtiri tongmong hetay rgit shryaq. Awtiri tehoq suruw lga magal nanak ru misuw lga tesazing na Kowhko ma. 1989 kawas, TongO Kowsantang teng ri lga spayang la, Awtiri gyut sang ka Oco msqun. 1995 kawas tmwang sanka Omong, ru 1999 kawas temong Oyalci . 政治 (sezi') tsotow na Awtiri ga hopa' balay na mrhuw. may mtzyu kawas lga saring kwara squilq sengkyo. spyang ga sotow maya lalu, Congri spang hopa na mrhuw. Awtiri ga sazing na linhoyan, qutux ga tzyul pgal payat na squilq rayhyo surux na Rengpangyal ru 183 na squilq sengkya na iyeng na Kominyel. Kominyel spyang na cyogung ga msi horik, msati giqas na sehuw sangka mlahuy. magal ini snhi Rangpang sehuw ru squilq. Rangpang rayhyo qpzing na mrhuw, galun nya maki kengri nya kominyng wal nya galun gaga ru sbinah nya lozi. lgan nha kominyen sprang na gaga, lengpangyen lga ungat ska syahaw 'zing na mincutang ru ska syahaw 'law na z'mintang . bsyaq balay thozyay surux beh sehu, nanu yasa ga Ocona koka msqun sehu ma. maki sipngan nanak na te qutux hopa cyux tama tzyung kawas Congri, 1999 kawas sengkyo, 'law mincwecui na ziyu te sazing na tang, nanu yasa ga Z'mintang mops ru mouw 社民黨 bsyaq na msqun sehu. mluw Zyutang mosque Yoireng Mong . maki Awtiri koka mani ga hopa balay qyaqeh nha. koka qani ga ini aw kwara inlungan ha, squilq; Omong maki ginas na kinpuyan Awtiri binas na qalang. trang Zyutang qyaqeh thazi, qeru byacing la wal lahan Omong la, yasa wal nzyut balq pin'buzyan la. 2002 kawas qeru byacing, nyux is maki sazing na 政策 ru gmleng na msang trang mpuw qutux byacing magal mrhuw yasa thoyay han qalang nha. wal nya galun 79席 ru 42.3% na kipu. magal te hopa balay na mrhuw, Ziyutang lga wal hotang kipu nya 18 席 balay. 10. 1% nanak kipu nya. maki 2006 kawas mpuw byacing qutux ryax na sengkyo ga, S'mintang yoway magal, trang sehuw na mrhuw. taring magal sehu' na kengri kbalay ziqas na "大聯合政府". trang ana maki sengkyo ga 中社民黨 ru 人民黨 ga cipok balay kipu nya. 社民黨 hya ga mhotaw ru ini tehoq 30%, mopuw qutux hlahuy wal hotaw kipu nya, wal maqux 3.3 個百分點 wal nya hnasun 人民黨 kipu. zihung pkayal lga, tehoq suruw mopuw sazing byacing sazing ryax taring kmalay surux klabang "大聯合政府", we'na Faimang blaq nha ziqas na mrhuw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA愷 外交部

Austria hya' ga cyux maki' tay 47 20 N, 13 20 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 83,871 sq km (maki' tay 114 ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 82,445 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,426 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 8,711,770. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 38.40%, lhlahuy hya' ga 47.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 14.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Vienna. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 26 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Alexander Van der Bellen, aring ryax tay 26 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. kkian Awtiri ga maki beh Oco na ska. rhyal siga wagiq tong ga rroq. A'pessan hnasun nya Awtiri. nanu yasa tehok qmisan lga san nha mslokah hi. rhyal rgyax maki 7% labang nya, syang na rgyax bhoboh tunux kwara. ska nya ga cecingyentayz . wagiq na rgyax ga takloknasan , hayapa ga 3798 米. weyna ga penti. tongnan ru pepu ga cyuring ru wagiq na rgyax. Dongpepu ga Donaw llyung, qruyux nya ga 350 koli. hanbu crux mu'h ru tlawah situ ga crux inh ru sa'cah . Awitiri ga maki hrhul na hakyang ru hoyaq cikay kayal nya, qmisan lga rhyaq. 'bagan lga mkilux. Awtiri na hlahuy ga fukayri ga 46.7 pasento, qalang mani ga spiyang tama beh syang na Donawh na weyna . spiyang na hogal ga crux sa'spaw . inspuluk , klac rulic . hitocbo nya ga 838379 pinxwang meta. ggalan pila Awitiri qani ga hoyaw balay ggalan pila. blaq balay qyanux squilq nha. yal qmayeh ru koba ga hoyaw kwara. spang nya balay ga kmalay kin, kikay, abura, lengki, kobana wazyang kbalay qhunq ru qsya;zyuwaw na pnqnyatan ga cyux kaping bzyoq. qmayeh ga cuyx ramat, mubi, qetun, ngahi. ggalan pila ga ubuy Omong na koka. nanu tasa maras cingay balay pila ma. 2006 kawas Awtiri na GDP tongan 3.3%. khmay na squilq kwara Awtiri qalang qani ga maki 92% na squilq, siki tehoq 1990 kawas nanslafu na yaqeh squilq mwah tmwan Awtiri, hga ga bolopa na squilq. kruma 10% ga iyat Awtiri na squilq, kwara squilq aring syaw na squilq. tokubet To'o na koka, maki qutux mang spat seng na Sloweniya . maki kntungpang ru Stiriya qalang. Oco ga cyugal qu rinhoyal. (Z'mat 日耳曼, Slafu 斯拉夫, lating 拉丁) Awtiri qalang qani ga lhuyal Z'mang Almanni , PaFariya , Flangk msqun. Maca', syownu, Slafu ru Loma na 'tayal uzi. ke'ru gaga nha ga mtnaq cikay uzi, kya nanak gaga nha uzi. hminas 74% na Awtiri squilq ga snhi cyorokay kwara 59.9% lga snhi Loma tengsukyo, 6% ga c'ng cyaw hey 3.5% ga 新教路德宗, 4% lga binah na 新教, 6% ga islancyang , Focyang , intucyaw , cingay balay itay na squilq maki Awtiri, 1930 kawas yutay hminas mcilyaq mopuw mang squilq nya, suruw lga trang te sazing cinbwanan hrgi' xalan pyutan . 1900 kawas thay kya halay 6,003,845 squilq nya la. suruw lga hbuyaw squilq la. 2017 kawas 3 byacing 14 ryax Awtiri na maki 8.598. 375 kwara squilq la. ke' Awtiri na mrhuw ga 德語 skatal nha, syaalmani skatal nha, congpaFaliya skayal nha uzi. ke' na Awtiri ckaw 德語 skayal nha uzi. ke' na Awtiri ckaw 德語 skayal nha. zywaw kinbkisan 1683 kawas Hapuspawwang 朝 maki weyena mciraq lga inipagan Oco Congsa glabang na 'tumang 帝國. 'lwan bkisan, Awitiri maki sarçal giray maki squilq piyano pslyan. glen na Loma, cingay balay kay't na squilq hlahuy qalang qani. suruw lga wal qolan Kay; t la. Lomatiko ini agal lga Awtiri leng tehoq Syuw, lungpati , Tongkt , Pafaliya ru Falank wal hga golan. Slafa mholuy musa beh A'pesti . qolan na Awtiri, ms'uruw kalantaniya 王國. kongye 788 kawas caliman wal qolan, sklokah muya pinbahuw, mwah khmay cyorokay uzi. Cariman ru Balank talax la, Awtiri g muck Nanak maki Falank, maki galan qasa ga song nha "marchia Orientalis"東方邊疆領之意. mrhuw na Pafali mlahang qalang qani. 976 kawas maki beh Papnpaw na Liawpot ru mcilyaq Nanslafa ru Syuwyali mlahang rhyal qsu balay maki lalu nya Awtiri mani ga sbibu Nha beh 9964 kawas, trang mbibu Ostarrichi ke' na 古德語 ma. 1156 kawas cipoq balay kneri nya Awtiri magan, 1192 kawas Pappaw na mrhuw wal galun Stayliya. 1246 kawas Awtiri ga mciyaq Fetle maki laytah wal mhoqeng la. Kpyut mciyaq (Papnpaw) la. Awtiri musa Posimiya na Mis' Awtoka na qbao lru 1278 kawas maki Pencyang mciyaq Congtoka ini agal Tic na Rukawfuis ru siki tehok te qutux cinbwanan mciyaq mosoq lga Awtiri lga galan nya Puspaw nasal qani kanhang, Hapuspaw cinngasal ga maki 14.15 seki mlahang slabang rhyal nha. 1526 kawas Awtiri wal nya galuw Posimiya ru 'mantu ini na Syuyari, sazing koka qani ga cingay balay moray nha. 1683 kawas qeru byacing mopuw sazing ryax na Weyena mciyaq cow Awtiri msqun Polan na hetay qryangan nya Weyena sazing byacing lga 'tuman ini maquh hetay qani. aring mciyaq qani ga hits nya 'tuman ru kura beh Oco 中西部 tonga slabang mshzi' bali msqun Hapuspaw wan caw maki Cowo na kenli, suluw lga mluw kwara hetay la. wayal 1699 kawas Ka'lofuci na keyak. Awtiri qalan nya Snsnlomatiko qalang nya. aring 1806 kawas lga Snsnlomatiko hoqeng lga Hopuspaw cinngasal ga mngaza S'lomatiko mouw Pulus, Awtiri taling mluw Pulis bsyaq balay kaw nya squn mna Tici kngli mcicyaq trang Awtiri tema mluw tnaqan Topulus ru 'los pin sazing sanka ru kwabu kengli ru mcilyaq, msqun kwara Awtiri ru Pulus 'los te sazing saka Kwah'polon tequtux ru tecyugal. 1806 kawas S'lomatiko sgayal, aniyasa lga sazing kawas myan, Fulacs Ps's'lomatiko shuti hwanti kmayal nanak muci hya ga Awtiriri na mrhuw ma. knahal ga i Awtiri spiyang qska qalang ga Hpuspow. 1867 kawas thzyazi Awtiri maki Puaw mcilyaq, leqaw nya kablar zyaw qani. pkayal muck Awtiri ga Kongcupang Awsyutiko mrhuw na Awsyugtiko maki Nanak ihwe ru haykuang nha, masoq mcilyaq lga ini maqux Awsyutiko qsugun nya cipoq balay na koka', Laytaniya lga mluw Awtiri la. (aring 1918 kawas mopuw byacing pusalqutux ryax tehoq 1919 kawas qeru byacing pusalqutux ryax) Mpusalqutux byacing song nha TicAwtiri , shtuy nha Tko ru Wemakonghko msqun. 1938 kawas nacuetko ru Taw msqun la. mosoq mcilyaq lga, Awtiri ga knahang pitu kawas na gikang. 1945 kawas ini maqux Nacuetka qani, Awtiri myup knahang Mongclung , siki tehoq 1955 kawas Awtiri koka smunan . maki Awtiri kmayal muci si bsyaq sa kaki kya ma. sqolan Awtiri tongmong hetay rgit shryaq. Awtiri tehoq suruw lga magal nanak ru misuw lga tesazing na Kowhko ma. 1989 kawas, TongO Kowsantang teng ri lga spayang la, Awtiri gyut sang ka Oco msqun. 1995 kawas tmwang sanka Omong, ru 1999 kawas temong Oyalci . 政治 (sezi') tsotow na Awtiri ga hopa' balay na mrhuw. may mtzyu kawas lga saring kwara squilq sengkyo. spyang ga sotow maya lalu, Congri spang hopa na mrhuw. Awtiri ga sazing na linhoyan, qutux ga tzyul pgal payat na squilq rayhyo surux na Rengpangyal ru 183 na squilq sengkya na iyeng na Kominyel. Kominyel spyang na cyogung ga msi horik, msati giqas na sehuw sangka mlahuy. magal ini snhi Rangpang sehuw ru squilq. Rangpang rayhyo qpzing na mrhuw, galun nya maki kengri nya kominyng wal nya galun gaga ru sbinah nya lozi. lgan nha kominyen sprang na gaga, lengpangyen lga ungat ska syahaw 'zing na mincutang ru ska syahaw 'law na z'mintang . bsyaq balay thozyay surux beh sehu, nanu yasa ga Ocona koka msqun sehu ma. maki sipngan nanak na te qutux hopa cyux tama tzyung kawas Congri, 1999 kawas sengkyo, 'law mincwecui na ziyu te sazing na tang, nanu yasa ga Z'mintang mops ru mouw 社民黨 bsyaq na msqun sehu. mluw Zyutang mosque Yoireng Mong . maki Awtiri koka mani ga hopa balay qyaqeh nha. koka qani ga ini aw kwara inlungan ha, squilq; Omong maki ginas na kinpuyan Awtiri binas na qalang. trang Zyutang qyaqeh thazi, qeru byacing la wal lahan Omong la, yasa wal nzyut balq pin'buzyan la. 2002 kawas qeru byacing, nyux is maki sazing na 政策 ru gmleng na msang trang mpuw qutux byacing magal mrhuw yasa thoyay han qalang nha. wal nya galun 79席 ru 42.3% na kipu. magal te hopa balay na mrhuw, Ziyutang lga wal hotang kipu nya 18 席 balay. 10. 1% nanak kipu nya. maki 2006 kawas mpuw byacing qutux ryax na sengkyo ga, S'mintang yoway magal, trang sehuw na mrhuw. taring magal sehu' na kengri kbalay ziqas na "大聯合政府". trang ana maki sengkyo ga 中社民黨 ru 人民黨 ga cipok balay kipu nya. 社民黨 hya ga mhotaw ru ini tehoq 30%, mopuw qutux hlahuy wal hotaw kipu nya, wal maqux 3.3 個百分點 wal nya hnasun 人民黨 kipu. zihung pkayal lga, tehoq suruw mopuw sazing byacing sazing ryax taring kmalay surux klabang "大聯合政府", we'na Faimang blaq nha ziqas na mrhuw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA愷 外交部
S.PHON: aus~ɕtria ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** e na oʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ **,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj *** ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *ienna. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj mawpuw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alexan*er *an *er βellen, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. kkian awtiri ɣa maki βeħ oʦ~ʨo na s~ɕka. rħjal s~ɕiɣa waɣiq toŋ ɣa rroq. aʔpes~ɕs~ɕan ħnas~ɕun nja awtiri. nanu jas~ɕa teħok qmis~ɕan lɣa s~ɕan nħa ms~ɕlokaħ ħi. rħjal rɣjax maki *% laβaŋ nja, s~ɕjaŋ na rɣjax βħoβoħ tunux kwara. s~ɕka nja ɣa ʦ~ʨeʦ~ʨiŋjentajz . waɣiq na rɣjax ɣa takloknas~ɕan , ħajapa ɣa **** *. wejna ɣa penti. toŋnan ru pepu ɣa ʦ~ʨjuriŋ ru waɣiq na rɣjax. *oŋpepu ɣa *onaw lljuŋ, qrujux nja ɣa *** koli. ħanβu ʦ~ʨrux muʔħ ru tlawaħ s~ɕitu ɣa ʦ~ʨrux inħ ru s~ɕaʔʦ~ʨaħ . awitiri ɣa maki ħrħul na ħakjaŋ ru ħojaq ʦ~ʨikaj kajal nja, qmis~ɕan lɣa rħjaq. ʔβaɣan lɣa mkilux. awtiri na ħlaħuj ɣa *ukajri ɣa **.* pas~ɕento, qalaŋ mani ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ tama βeħ s~ɕjaŋ na *onawħ na wejna . s~ɕpijaŋ na ħoɣal ɣa ʦ~ʨrux s~ɕaʔs~ɕpaw . ins~ɕpuluk , klaʦ~ʨ ruliʦ~ʨ . ħitoʦ~ʨβo nja ɣa ****** pinxwaŋ meta. ɣɣalan pila awitiri qani ɣa ħojaw βalaj ɣɣalan pila. βlaq βalaj qjanux s~ɕquilq nħa. jal qmajeħ ru koβa ɣa ħojaw kwara. s~ɕpaŋ nja βalaj ɣa kmalaj kin, kikaj, aβura, leŋki, koβana wazjaŋ kβalaj qħunq ru qs~ɕja;zjuwaw na pnqnjatan ɣa ʦ~ʨjux kapiŋ βzjoq. qmajeħ ɣa ʦ~ʨujx ramat, muβi, qetun, ŋaħi. ɣɣalan pila ɣa uβuj omoŋ na koka. nanu tas~ɕa maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj pila ma. **** kawas~ɕ awtiri na ɣ*p toŋan *.*%. kħmaj na s~ɕquilq kwara awtiri qalaŋ qani ɣa maki **% na s~ɕquilq, s~ɕiki teħoq **** kawas~ɕ nans~ɕla*u na jaqeħ s~ɕquilq mwaħ tmwan awtiri, ħɣa ɣa βolopa na s~ɕquilq. kruma **% ɣa ijat awtiri na s~ɕquilq, kwara s~ɕquilq ariŋ s~ɕjaw na s~ɕquilq. tokuβet toʔo na koka, maki qutux maŋ s~ɕpat s~ɕeŋ na s~ɕlowenija . maki kntuŋpaŋ ru s~ɕtirija qalaŋ. oʦ~ʨo ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal qu rinħojal. (zʔmat ***, s~ɕla*u ***, latiŋ **) awtiri qalaŋ qani ɣa lħujal zʔmaŋ almanni , pa*arija , *laŋk ms~ɕqun. maʦ~ʨaʔ, s~ɕjownu, s~ɕla*u ru loma na ʔtajal uzi. keʔru ɣaɣa nħa ɣa mtnaq ʦ~ʨikaj uzi, kja nanak ɣaɣa nħa uzi. ħminas~ɕ **% na awtiri s~ɕquilq ɣa s~ɕnħi ʦ~ʨjorokaj kwara **.*% lɣa s~ɕnħi loma teŋs~ɕukjo, *% ɣa ʦ~ʨʔŋ ʦ~ʨjaw ħej *.*% ɣa *****, *% lɣa βinaħ na **, *% ɣa is~ɕlanʦ~ʨjaŋ , *oʦ~ʨjaŋ , intuʦ~ʨjaw , ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj itaj na s~ɕquilq maki awtiri, **** kawas~ɕ jutaj ħminas~ɕ mʦ~ʨiljaq mopuw maŋ s~ɕquilq nja, s~ɕuruw lɣa traŋ te s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan ħrɣiʔ xalan pjutan . **** kawas~ɕ tħaj kja ħalaj *,***,*** s~ɕquilq nja la. s~ɕuruw lɣa ħβujaw s~ɕquilq la. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax awtiri na maki *.***. *** kwara s~ɕquilq la. keʔ awtiri na mrħuw ɣa ** s~ɕkatal nħa, s~ɕjaalmani s~ɕkatal nħa, ʦ~ʨoŋpa*alija s~ɕkajal nħa uzi. keʔ na awtiri ʦ~ʨkaw ** s~ɕkajal nħa uzi. keʔ na awtiri ʦ~ʨkaw ** s~ɕkajal nħa. zjwaw kinβkis~ɕan **** kawas~ɕ ħapus~ɕpawwaŋ * maki wejena mʦ~ʨiraq lɣa inipaɣan oʦ~ʨo ʦ~ʨoŋs~ɕa ɣlaβaŋ na ʔtumaŋ **. ʔlwan βkis~ɕan, awitiri maki s~ɕar*al ɣiraj maki s~ɕquilq pijano ps~ɕljan. ɣlen na loma, ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj kajʔt na s~ɕquilq ħlaħuj qalaŋ qani. s~ɕuruw lɣa wal qolan kaj; t la. lomatiko ini aɣal lɣa awtiri leŋ teħoq s~ɕjuw, luŋpati , toŋkt , pa*alija ru *alank wal ħɣa ɣolan. s~ɕla*a mħoluj mus~ɕa βeħ aʔpes~ɕti . qolan na awtiri, ms~ɕʔuruw kalantanija **. koŋje *** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨaliman wal qolan, s~ɕklokaħ muja pinβaħuw, mwaħ kħmaj ʦ~ʨjorokaj uzi. ʦ~ʨariman ru βalank talax la, awtiri ɣ muʦ~ʨk nanak maki *alank, maki ɣalan qas~ɕa ɣa s~ɕoŋ nħa "marʦ~ʨħia orientalis~ɕ"*******. mrħuw na pa*ali mlaħaŋ qalaŋ qani. *** kawas~ɕ maki βeħ papnpaw na liawpot ru mʦ~ʨiljaq nans~ɕla*a ru s~ɕjuwjali mlaħaŋ rħjal qs~ɕu βalaj maki lalu nja awtiri mani ɣa s~ɕβiβu nħa βeħ **** kawas~ɕ, traŋ mβiβu os~ɕtarriʦ~ʨħi keʔ na *** ma. **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨipoq βalaj kneri nja awtiri maɣan, **** kawas~ɕ pappaw na mrħuw wal ɣalun s~ɕtajlija. **** kawas~ɕ awtiri ɣa mʦ~ʨijaq *etle maki lajtaħ wal mħoqeŋ la. kpjut mʦ~ʨijaq (papnpaw) la. awtiri mus~ɕa pos~ɕimija na mis~ɕʔ awtoka na qβao lru **** kawas~ɕ maki penʦ~ʨjaŋ mʦ~ʨijaq ʦ~ʨoŋtoka ini aɣal tiʦ~ʨ na rukaw*uis~ɕ ru s~ɕiki teħok te qutux ʦ~ʨinβwanan mʦ~ʨijaq mos~ɕoq lɣa awtiri lɣa ɣalan nja pus~ɕpaw nas~ɕal qani kanħaŋ, ħapus~ɕpaw ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal ɣa maki **.** s~ɕeki mlaħaŋ s~ɕlaβaŋ rħjal nħa. **** kawas~ɕ awtiri wal nja ɣaluw pos~ɕimija ru ʔmantu ini na s~ɕjujari, s~ɕaziŋ koka qani ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj moraj nħa. **** kawas~ɕ qeru βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mopuw s~ɕaziŋ rjax na wejena mʦ~ʨijaq ʦ~ʨow awtiri ms~ɕqun polan na ħetaj qrjaŋan nja wejena s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʔtuman ini maquħ ħetaj qani. ariŋ mʦ~ʨijaq qani ɣa ħits~ɕ nja ʔtuman ru kura βeħ oʦ~ʨo *** toŋa s~ɕlaβaŋ ms~ɕħziʔ βali ms~ɕqun ħapus~ɕpaw wan ʦ~ʨaw maki ʦ~ʨowo na kenli, s~ɕuluw lɣa mluw kwara ħetaj la. wajal **** kawas~ɕ kaʔlo*uʦ~ʨi na kejak. awtiri qalan nja s~ɕns~ɕnlomatiko qalaŋ nja. ariŋ **** kawas~ɕ lɣa s~ɕns~ɕnlomatiko ħoqeŋ lɣa ħopus~ɕpaw ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal ɣa mŋaza s~ɕʔlomatiko mouw pulus~ɕ, awtiri taliŋ mluw pulis~ɕ βs~ɕjaq βalaj kaw nja s~ɕqun mna tiʦ~ʨi kŋli mʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨjaq traŋ awtiri tema mluw tnaqan topulus~ɕ ru ʔlos~ɕ pin s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕanka ru kwaβu keŋli ru mʦ~ʨiljaq, ms~ɕqun kwara awtiri ru pulus~ɕ ʔlos~ɕ te s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕaka kwaħʔpolon tequtux ru teʦ~ʨjuɣal. **** kawas~ɕ s~ɕʔlomatiko s~ɕɣajal, anijas~ɕa lɣa s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ mjan, *ulaʦ~ʨs~ɕ ps~ɕʔs~ɕʔlomatiko s~ɕħuti ħwanti kmajal nanak muʦ~ʨi ħja ɣa awtiriri na mrħuw ma. knaħal ɣa i awtiri s~ɕpijaŋ qs~ɕka qalaŋ ɣa ħpus~ɕpow. **** kawas~ɕ tħzjazi awtiri maki puaw mʦ~ʨiljaq, leqaw nja kaβlar zjaw qani. pkajal muʦ~ʨk awtiri ɣa koŋʦ~ʨupaŋ aws~ɕjutiko mrħuw na aws~ɕjuɣtiko maki nanak iħwe ru ħajkuaŋ nħa, mas~ɕoq mʦ~ʨiljaq lɣa ini maqux aws~ɕjutiko qs~ɕuɣun nja ʦ~ʨipoq βalaj na kokaʔ, lajtanija lɣa mluw awtiri la. (ariŋ **** kawas~ɕ mopuw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ pus~ɕalqutux rjax teħoq **** kawas~ɕ qeru βjaʦ~ʨiŋ pus~ɕalqutux rjax) mpus~ɕalqutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕoŋ nħa tiʦ~ʨawtiri , s~ɕħtuj nħa tko ru wemakoŋħko ms~ɕqun. **** kawas~ɕ naʦ~ʨuetko ru taw ms~ɕqun la. mos~ɕoq mʦ~ʨiljaq lɣa, awtiri ɣa knaħaŋ pitu kawas~ɕ na ɣikaŋ. **** kawas~ɕ ini maqux naʦ~ʨuetka qani, awtiri mjup knaħaŋ moŋʦ~ʨluŋ , s~ɕiki teħoq **** kawas~ɕ awtiri koka s~ɕmunan . maki awtiri kmajal muʦ~ʨi s~ɕi βs~ɕjaq s~ɕa kaki kja ma. s~ɕqolan awtiri toŋmoŋ ħetaj rɣit s~ɕħrjaq. awtiri teħoq s~ɕuruw lɣa maɣal nanak ru mis~ɕuw lɣa tes~ɕaziŋ na kowħko ma. **** kawas~ɕ, toŋo kows~ɕantaŋ teŋ ri lɣa s~ɕpajaŋ la, awtiri ɣjut s~ɕaŋ ka oʦ~ʨo ms~ɕqun. **** kawas~ɕ tmwaŋ s~ɕanka omoŋ, ru **** kawas~ɕ temoŋ ojalʦ~ʨi . ** (s~ɕeziʔ) ts~ɕotow na awtiri ɣa ħopaʔ βalaj na mrħuw. maj mtzju kawas~ɕ lɣa s~ɕariŋ kwara s~ɕquilq s~ɕeŋkjo. s~ɕpjaŋ ɣa s~ɕotow maja lalu, ʦ~ʨoŋri s~ɕpaŋ ħopa na mrħuw. awtiri ɣa s~ɕaziŋ na linħojan, qutux ɣa tzjul pɣal pajat na s~ɕquilq rajħjo s~ɕurux na reŋpaŋjal ru *** na s~ɕquilq s~ɕeŋkja na ijeŋ na kominjel. kominjel s~ɕpjaŋ na ʦ~ʨjoɣuŋ ɣa ms~ɕi ħorik, ms~ɕati ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕeħuw s~ɕaŋka mlaħuj. maɣal ini s~ɕnħi raŋpaŋ s~ɕeħuw ru s~ɕquilq. raŋpaŋ rajħjo qpziŋ na mrħuw, ɣalun nja maki keŋri nja kominjŋ wal nja ɣalun ɣaɣa ru s~ɕβinaħ nja lozi. lɣan nħa kominjen s~ɕpraŋ na ɣaɣa, leŋpaŋjen lɣa uŋat s~ɕka s~ɕjaħaw ʔziŋ na minʦ~ʨutaŋ ru s~ɕka s~ɕjaħaw ʔlaw na zʔmintaŋ . βs~ɕjaq βalaj tħozjaj s~ɕurux βeħ s~ɕeħu, nanu jas~ɕa ɣa oʦ~ʨona koka ms~ɕqun s~ɕeħu ma. maki s~ɕipŋan nanak na te qutux ħopa ʦ~ʨjux tama tzjuŋ kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨoŋri, **** kawas~ɕ s~ɕeŋkjo, ʔlaw minʦ~ʨweʦ~ʨui na ziju te s~ɕaziŋ na taŋ, nanu jas~ɕa ɣa zʔmintaŋ mops~ɕ ru mouw *** βs~ɕjaq na ms~ɕqun s~ɕeħu. mluw zjutaŋ mos~ɕque joireŋ moŋ . maki awtiri koka mani ɣa ħopa βalaj qjaqeħ nħa. koka qani ɣa ini aw kwara inluŋan ħa, s~ɕquilq; omoŋ maki ɣinas~ɕ na kinpujan awtiri βinas~ɕ na qalaŋ. traŋ zjutaŋ qjaqeħ tħazi, qeru βjaʦ~ʨiŋ la wal laħan omoŋ la, jas~ɕa wal nzjut βalq pinʔβuzjan la. **** kawas~ɕ qeru βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, njux is~ɕ maki s~ɕaziŋ na ** ru ɣmleŋ na ms~ɕaŋ traŋ mpuw qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ maɣal mrħuw jas~ɕa tħojaj ħan qalaŋ nħa. wal nja ɣalun *** ru **.*% na kipu. maɣal te ħopa βalaj na mrħuw, zijutaŋ lɣa wal ħotaŋ kipu nja ** * βalaj. **. *% nanak kipu nja. maki **** kawas~ɕ mpuw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qutux rjax na s~ɕeŋkjo ɣa, s~ɕʔmintaŋ jowaj maɣal, traŋ s~ɕeħuw na mrħuw. tariŋ maɣal s~ɕeħuʔ na keŋri kβalaj ziqas~ɕ na "*****". traŋ ana maki s~ɕeŋkjo ɣa **** ru *** ɣa ʦ~ʨipok βalaj kipu nja. *** ħja ɣa mħotaw ru ini teħoq **%, mopuw qutux ħlaħuj wal ħotaw kipu nja, wal maqux *.* **** wal nja ħnas~ɕun *** kipu. ziħuŋ pkajal lɣa, teħoq s~ɕuruw mopuw s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕaziŋ rjax tariŋ kmalaj s~ɕurux klaβaŋ "*****", weʔna *aimaŋ βlaq nħa ziqas~ɕ na mrħuw. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia* ***
